Class AnyURIType

java.lang.Object
org.apache.axis2.mex.om.MexOM
org.apache.axis2.mex.om.AnyURIType
All Implemented Interfaces:
IMexOM
Direct Known Subclasses:
Dialect, Identifier, Location
public abstract class AnyURIType extends MexOM implements IMexOM
Base Class implemented for element(s) that of type='xs:anyURI' defined in the WS-MEX spec.
